title: ARTISTS' AUTHORSHIP RIGHTS ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 34.  ARTISTS' AUTHORSHIP RIGHTS ACT

§2151.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known as the "Artists' Authorship Rights Act."

Acts 1986, No. 599, §1.
